name: 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection
about: 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection is a drug type injection that is used to treat hormone receptor-positive metastatic breast cancer in women who have gone through menopause. It is suggested to be taken as per the doctors prescription. This medication is manufactured in India and comes in a liquid form. Proper storage instructions should be followed, keeping the medicine in a dry and cool place. The injection contains 250mg of Fulvestrant hormone, which helps to slow or stop the growth of cancer cells that need estrogen to grow. It is given as a slow injection into the muscle of your buttocks. This medication is solely for women. It is important to take this injection as directed by your doctor, at the same time each month.

faq.q: What is 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection used for?
faq.a: 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection is used to treat hormone receptor-positive metastatic breast cancer in women who have gone through menopause.

faq.q: How should I take 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection?
faq.a: 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection should be taken as directed by your doctor. It is given as a slow injection into the muscle of your buttocks.

faq.q: What is the dosage of 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection?
faq.a: The dosage of 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection is 250mg, to be taken as per the doctors prescription.

faq.q: What are the storage instructions for 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection?
faq.a: 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection should be stored in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: Is 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection safe for women?
faq.a: Yes, 250 MG Fulvestrant Injection is solely for women and is safe to use as directed by your doctor.
